title: lindsaea hornei
intro: Lindsaea hornei is a species of fern in the family Lindsaeaceae, commonly known as the Horne's lindsaea or Horne's tree fern. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. The herbal preparations of Lindsaea hornei include infusions and decoctions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
